历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including former Science Category) was approximately 9296 → 9343 → 31699 (discontinuity) → 18463 → 16799. In 2023, due to a discontinuity, the ranking abnormally dropped to about 31700, recovered to about 18463 in 2024, and continued to rise to about 16799 in 2025, with a cumulative forward shift of about 1664 in the last two years, showing a clear warming trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 16799; the enrollment plan for this university in Gansu Province Physics Category (including former Science Category) was: 80 in 2021 → 48 in 2022 → 75 in 2023 → 72 in 2024 → 70 in 2025 → 82 in 2026. In 2026, compared to 2025, there is an expansion of 12 students (an increase of about 17.1%), a relatively large expansion, theoretically easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it is about 60th, with stable rankings in the 55-67 range in recent years, belonging to the only 211 university among national medical colleges, with obvious level advantages; no negative events have appeared in the reputation evaluation documents, with a stable reputation; Douyin popularity ranking is 78th (evaluation 'average'), with moderate exposure on short video platforms, no obvious signal of increased attention for applications; there is no information on historical abnormal application records for this university (the 2023 discontinuity was a structural fluctuation after the merger of science batches in Gansu Province, not a reputation event).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical medicine has been 'highly recommended' for many consecutive years, stomatology is 'recommended', and the overall popularity of medical majors remains high; in 2025, the number of Physics Category examinees in Gansu Province is about 121,443, and in 2026, the total number of examinees is about 218,700. Estimating based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 66.6%, the number of Physics Category examinees in 2026 is about 145,654, an increase of about 20% compared to 2025, with a significant expansion in the examinee scale, intensifying competition. Tianjin Medical University is located in Tianjin, with an enrollment proportion in Gansu Province of about 1.2% (2025), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no local preference effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of about 16799, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 17.1% (causing a backward shift in ranking), the increase in Gansu Province Physics Category examinees of about 20% (causing a forward shift in ranking), and the sustained high popularity of medical majors (causing a forward shift in ranking), the expansion and examinee growth roughly offset each other, but the examinee growth slightly dominates. Coupled with the undiminished popularity of medicine, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift slightly forward compared to 2025 (competition slightly intensifies). The predicted minimum ranking is about 18327, with a range of 17827-18827.

If the ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Clinical Medicine Five-Year Program, Optometry and Visual Science, Anesthesiology, etc.). Tier 1 majors (5+3 Integrated Clinical/Stomatology) require a ranking significantly better than the lower limit of the range to attempt. Tier 3 majors (Nursing, Pharmacy, Medical Technology) can be used as safe choices. Medical majors overall have high popularity, so it is recommended to combine personal interests and career plans for a reasonable mix.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan

Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a reduction of 2 students (a decrease of 40%), a significant reduction that theoretically intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 60th in the Soft Science Ranking, with a clear level advantage. However, as a medical-focused university, it offers very few majors under History Category (only Public Service Management and Nursing), which are not its core strengths. Its reputation is stable, with no significant negative incidents; Douyin popularity is average. The enrollment scale for History Category is extremely small, limiting the impact of public opinion. Public Service Management falls under management disciplines, which are not the university's strong areas.

专业热度与地域.text: The Nursing major has a social popularity rating of 'recommended' and faces a talent shortage. Public Service Management has average popularity. 预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of about 7854, a 40% enrollment reduction in 2026 (which moves the ranking forward), a 25% increase in History Category examinees (which moves the ranking forward), and the relatively high popularity of Nursing (which moves the ranking forward), the combined effect of enrollment reduction and examinee growth significantly intensifies competition. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will move substantially forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5869, with a range of 5369-6369.
